contests.title: Search Maintenance
contests.description: We are doing maintenance on our search service. It may be unavailable from 7am-3pm UTC.
contests.summary: We are doing maintenance on our search service. It may be unavailable from 7am-3pm UTC....

contests.title: Failed Generations Due to Enhanced Compatibility
contests.description: Generations with enhanced compatibility are causing images to fail and not be automatically refunded. Please make sure it's off! https://civitai.red/issues
contests.summary: Generations with enhanced compatibility are causing images to fail and not be automatically refunded. Please make sure it's off! https://civitai.red/issues...

contests.title: A GPU Crunch, and Bumpy Days Ahead
contests.description: Our primary data center is pulling GPU support to switch to mining, on under 48 hours notice. Generation still works but will be slower while we move. Here is the full picture and what to expect.
contests.summary: Our primary data center is pulling GPU support to switch to mining, on under 48 hours notice. Generation still works but will be slower while we move. Here is the full picture and what to expect....
